ddls:
CREATE TABLE "anime_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anime series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the anime series */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the anime (e.g., TV, Movie) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the anime was released */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current viewing status (e.g., Watched, Dropped, Want to Watch) */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the series */,
  "production_studio" TEXT /* Name of the production studio responsible for the anime */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the anime series */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the anime series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the anime series */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the anime series image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the anime series trailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the series details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user providing the rating */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating for the series (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment about the series */,
  "date_rated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who created the watchlist */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series in the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anime series in the watchlist (e.g., Watched, Dropped, Want to Watch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series associated with the tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anime_series_genres" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who wrote the review */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the anime series being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES anime_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
